title: Intelligence Matrix Entry
description: Schema for classifying ingested data through the Holistika DI framework (SOP 2.2). Every piece of data passes through this matrix before entering the Knowledge Graph.

fact_id.description: Unique identifier for an isolated concept (e.g., fct_001)

source_credibility.description: Numerical score comparing the source to an average baseline (0 = no credibility, 1 = fully verified)

direct_impact.description: Quantitative score used by the reasoning engine to prioritize context — direct causal relationship

indirect_impact.description: Quantitative score for secondary or downstream effects

pestel_category.description: PESTEL framework category applied dynamically during data analysis

generational_filter.description: Generational cohort filter applied to understand nuanced behavioral patterns

ssot_verified.description: Whether this fact has a cryptographically verifiable Source of Truth
